name: Mikkel Nielsen Blyeberg — father and father's death (Denmark, born 1779)
researcher_question: Who was the father of Mikkel Nielsen Blyeberg, born 20 August 1779 in Stagstrup Sogn, Thisted (Vestervig) Amt, Denmark, and when did his father die?
notes: Reframed from a records-walkthrough case study. The source traces Mikkel's life through the Danish Military Levying Rolls (Lægdsruller) rather than posing a parents question; the reframe turns it into 'identify the father and his death date.' Core evidence = the levying rolls, which name the father directly above the son but are browse-only image rolls, not name-indexed on FamilySearch; the father's death is confirmed only in the Stagstrup parish burial register. The mother is never named in the source, so she is not a finding. Recoverability via FamilySearch record search is low-to-moderate.
